_meta.notes: Legacy traits — cross-run scars and gifts imprinted on death. Each death classifier (lib/legacy/imprint.ts) maps a death cause + form to one trait id; the trait's effect applies to the player's next reincarnation via lib/legacy/apply.ts.

traits.label: Fire-scarred
traits.description: Your last form burned. The next remembers heat.

traits.label: Unburnt
traits.description: Two deaths to fire. The flames lose interest.

traits.label: Water-affined
traits.description: Your last form drowned. The next breathes more easily under.

traits.label: Crushed
traits.description: Your last form was broken by weight. The next stands ready for it.

traits.label: Gravity-aware
traits.description: You fell. You will not fall again.

traits.label: Venom-remembered
traits.description: Poison ran through what you were. The next cleans it faster.

traits.label: Starved
traits.description: Your last form ran out. The next holds what little it has.

traits.label: Betrayed
traits.description: Killed by an ally's edge. Trust comes harder now.

traits.label: Torn
traits.description: Claws and teeth. The next form's hide is a little thicker.

traits.label: Exposed
traits.description: Cold ended you. The next runs warmer.

traits.label: Drowned
traits.description: Two deaths under water. Lungs are no longer the only path.

traits.label: Haunted
traits.description: An NPC's grudge survives the death. They remember you.

traits.label: Whimsical
traits.description: You died laughing. Or close enough. The next is light.

traits.label: Binder-broken
traits.description: A book's spine snapped. The next form holds together longer.

traits.label: Core-cracked
traits.description: A dungeon core split. The next form summons more carefully.

traits.label: Wyrm-touched
traits.description: The Long Wyrm tasted you. Its dreams stay with you.

traits.label: Many-lived
traits.description: You have died often. The cycle barely notices the next.

traits.label: Voiceless
traits.description: Silenced before the end. The next form's first turn carries weight.

traits.label: Self-undone
traits.description: You ended yourself by your own tool. A small humility carries.

traits.label: Abandoned
traits.description: The session ended without verdict. The next is patient.
